highlights.description: Workflow compliance checking against reference repositories with exact and equivalent matching
Local filesystem collector for scanning repositories without GitHub API
GitHub Action for CI/CD integration with compliance checks
Automated workflow remediation with template-based generation

added.description: Compliance check result model types (`CheckResult`, `CheckSummary`, `RepoCheckResult`)
Local filesystem collector with parallel scanning and language detection
Workflow compliance checker with reference repository matching
HTML report formatter for compliance check results
Markdown report formatter for compliance check results
GitHub Action (`action.yaml`) for compliance checking in CI pipelines
JSON Schema for check result validation (`schema/check_result.schema.json`)
Cedar policy examples for workflow compliance (strict, gradual, base)
Workflow generator with templates for Go CI, lint, and CodeQL
Compliance context in policy evaluation (`ComplianceContext`)
Multi-source repository collection (`ListUserRepos`, `ListReposMultiSource`)
Dashforge dashboard generation for compliance results with metrics, charts, and tables

documentation.description: CLI documentation for `check`, `apply`, and `remediate` commands
Dashboard and workflow example configurations
Compliance scan planning documents
MkDocs site URLs updated to plexusone organization
PlexusOne unified MkDocs theme with dark mode default
README icons added to Features section
README shields updated
Release notes for v0.2.0
README updated with v0.2.0 features and check command examples
Changelog page added to MkDocs documentation

dependencies.description: `github.com/google/go-github/v84` upgraded from v82 for gogithub compatibility

internal.description: CI workflows updated to shared workflows

highlights.description: Multi-org GitHub repository scanning with Cedar policy-as-code evaluation
Four output formats (JSON, Markdown, SARIF, CSV) with GitHub Security integration
Built-in rate limiting with exponential backoff for large-scale scans

added.description: CLI with `scan`, `validate`, and `version` commands using Cobra framework
GitHub collector for repository, workflow, and branch protection data
Cedar policy engine with support for custom and built-in policies
Built-in policies: `require-workflow`, `require-tests`, `go-versions`
Profile system with three built-in profiles: `default`, `modern`, `legacy`
JSON report format with compliance summary and per-repo details
Markdown report format with status icons and severity indicators
SARIF 2.1.0 report format for GitHub Security tab integration
CSV report format for spreadsheet analysis
Repository filtering by language, topics, visibility, archived/fork status
Policy validation command with syntax checking
Rate limiting with automatic retry, exponential backoff, and GitHub `X-RateLimit-*` header support
Example Cedar policies for Go projects (merge, versions, matrix, dependencies, reusable-workflow)

fixed.description: Windows CI failures due to PowerShell misinterpreting `./...` path

documentation.description: MkDocs documentation site with Material theme (21 pages)
CLI reference for scan, validate, and configuration
Cedar policy syntax guide and writing policies tutorial
Profile system documentation with customization guide
GitHub Actions integration guide with workflow examples
SARIF integration guide for GitHub Security tab
Contributing guide and development roadmap
Release notes for v0.1.0
Releases section added to MkDocs navigation
Limitations column added to Enterprise Practice Summary in MRD
README shields for CI, Go Report Card, and license

Unit tests for profile manager (8 tests)

Unit tests for repository filtering (12 tests)
